file_expectations.phrase: delegate to ATLAS with a Task Packet

routes.notes: Cron, scheduling, heartbeat, reminders, and recurring execution route through ATLAS for non-trivial workflows.

file_expectations.phrase: delegate to POLARIS with a Task Packet

routes.notes: Admin workflows route to POLARIS, with execution flowing through ATLAS when needed.

routes.trigger_phrase: Infra / gateway / ports / host health / deploy
routes.notes: Infra and gateway work route through ATLAS, then STRATUS for host work and PULSE for queue/retry staging as needed.
Emotional distress routes to EMBER, with safety-first handling for crisis language.
Money and buying decisions route to LEDGER after a small intake.

routes.trigger_phrase: Discovery or gaming requests are off-core extension work

file_expectations.phrase: PIXEL: discovery and tool scouting for extension work
do not route default daily work through PIXEL or QUEST

routes.notes: Tool exploration is an explicit extension workflow in ORION core; PIXEL remains available when that extension lane is intentionally invoked.
Source-backed external validation and current release/tool claims route to WIRE.

file_expectations.phrase: Do you want to explore or execute right now?
Do you want to explore or execute right now?

routes.notes: Mixed intent must ask the exact explore-vs-execute gate before delegation.

routes.trigger_phrase: Discovery or gaming requests are off-core extension work

file_expectations.phrase: QUEST: gaming copilot for extension work
do not route default daily work through PIXEL or QUEST

routes.notes: Gaming support is no longer part of default ORION core routing; QUEST remains an explicit extension lane.

routes.trigger_phrase: System glue / repo organization / drift / "where should this live"

file_expectations.phrase: then NODE when packet or incident records need cleanup
Treat NODE, PULSE, and STRATUS as implementation detail behind ATLAS

routes.notes: System glue and repo-organization drift route through ATLAS, which may use NODE for packet and incident structure.
